description: Style Notearrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a a tried-and-true favourite with a sleek silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels.Product DetailsHot pink, red and black striped round neck top, has short puffed sleeves with ruching, crystal embellishment on the left hemMaterial and Care95% cotton and 5% lycraMachine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if requiredSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
